1050401.name: Obsessive Hammer
1050401.desc: When below 50% HP, remove 1 negative status effect and gain 1 Fanatic, 1 Attack Power Up, and 3 Protection at the start of the combat phase.

1050421.name: Highest Honor
1050421.desc:
Apply 1 Attack Power Up and 1 Protection to the ally with the least HP below 50%.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 1 Fanatic.
